violations.text: Certified FMC 535417 has expired as of 2/11/25 license must be renewed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Chemical cleaner bottle was observed in the hand-washing sink located next to walk-in cooler. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Person-in-charge removed and relocated chemical cleaner bottle to designated area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Observed the chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the sanitizer machine was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Person-in-charge placed a service call at time of inspection. Establishment set up 3-bay sink to wash, rinse and sanitizer dishes until dish washer is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with food debris. Person-in-charge relocated can opener to 3-bay sink. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Observed the non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine backplate) have residue dripping in ice. Person-in-charge washed, rinsed, and sanitized ice machine backplate and voluntary disposed of ice at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Observed faucet to hand washing sink located next to walk-in cooler area was not in good repair. Metal underneath faucet knobs are corroded and have other debris/residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (gaskets in prep units and shelving in 3-bay sink area) have a residue/debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the back prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The three bay sink is lacking plugs/stoppers. Equipment must be kept in good repair and proper adjustment to allow for adequate use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
The receptacle in the emplyee restoom is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The floors under equipement throughout the facility have soil and other debris 2) The ceiling/light fixture area above the cook line has an accumulation of dust New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
